description: Create the @quant/device-control package skeleton with capability interfaces, registry, permission model, action audit, and tests. Branch from feat/phase-41-latency-budget-ci to feat/phase-42-device-control-skeleton.
steps: Create git branch feat/phase-42-device-control-skeleton from current branch feat/phase-41-latency-budget-ci

Create packages/device-control/package.json following the pattern of packages/identity-permissions/package.json: name @quant/device-control, private, type module, main/types pointing to src/index.ts, scripts (build: tsc, typecheck: tsc --noEmit, test: vitest run, lint: eslint .), dependencies on @capacitor/core and zod, devDependencies on @types/node, typescript, vitest
Create packages/device-control/tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.json with outDir ./dist, rootDir ./src, composite true, include src/**/*

Create packages/device-control/src/capabilities/types.ts with: DeviceCapability type union ('phone'|'sms'|'contacts'|'camera'|'location'|'sensors'|'bluetooth'|'wifi'|'files'|'notifications'|'accessibility'), DevicePlatform type ('web'|'android'|'ios'), CapabilityProvider<T> interface (isAvailable, initialize, dispose)

Create packages/device-control/src/capabilities/phone.ts with PhoneCapability interface extending CapabilityProvider (placeCall, answerCall, endCall, holdCall, transferCall with appropriate param/return types)
Create packages/device-control/src/capabilities/sms.ts with SMSCapability interface (sendSMS, readSMS, onIncomingSMS)
Create packages/device-control/src/capabilities/contacts.ts with ContactsCapability interface (list, get, create, update, delete, search, sync)
Create packages/device-control/src/capabilities/camera.ts with CameraCapability interface (takePhoto, recordVideo, scanQR, scanDocument)
Create packages/device-control/src/capabilities/location.ts with LocationCapability interface (getCurrentPosition, watchPosition, geocode, reverseGeocode)
Create packages/device-control/src/capabilities/sensors.ts with SensorsCapability interface (accelerometer, gyroscope, heartRate, ambientLight subscriptions)
Create packages/device-control/src/capabilities/bluetooth.ts with BluetoothCapability interface (scan, pair, connect, disconnect, listDevices)
Create packages/device-control/src/capabilities/wifi.ts with WiFiCapability interface (listNetworks, connect, disconnect, getCurrentNetwork)
Create packages/device-control/src/capabilities/files.ts with FilesCapability interface (read, write, delete, list, copy, move, getInfo)
Create packages/device-control/src/capabilities/notifications.ts with NotificationsCapability interface (list, dismiss, snooze, reply, onNew)
Create packages/device-control/src/capabilities/accessibility.ts with AccessibilityCapability interface (getScreenContent, tap, type, scroll, findElement)
Create packages/device-control/src/capabilities/index.ts barrel exporting all capability interfaces
Create packages/device-control/src/registry.ts with CapabilityRegistry class: register/get/has/getAvailable methods, platform detection (detectPlatform()), can(capability) query

Create packages/device-control/src/permissions/permission-types.ts with DevicePermissionState type ('granted'|'denied'|'prompt'|'unavailable'), DevicePermissionTier mapping capabilities to AgentActionTier (0-4)
Create packages/device-control/src/permissions/permission-manager.ts with PermissionManager class: check(capability), request(capability), getState(capability), getTierForCapability(capability)
Create packages/device-control/src/permissions/index.ts barrel exports

Create packages/device-control/src/audit/action-audit.ts with DeviceActionAudit class: log(entry) append-only, query(filter) by timeRange/capability/action, getHistory(), export(). Entry has timestamp, capability, action, params, result, undoRecipe
Create packages/device-control/src/audit/index.ts barrel export
Create packages/device-control/src/index.ts barrel exporting everything from capabilities, registry, permissions, audit
Create packages/device-control/src/__tests__/registry.test.ts testing: register capability provider, query availability, platform detection, can() checks
Create packages/device-control/src/__tests__/permission-manager.test.ts testing: permission states, tier mapping, request flow
Create packages/device-control/src/__tests__/action-audit.test.ts testing: logging entries, querying by filter, history export
Run pnpm install to link the new package
Run pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/device-control to verify types
Run pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/device-control to verify tests pass
Commit with message: feat(device-control): add package skeleton with capability interfaces and registry
acceptance_criteria: packages/device-control/package.json exists with correct name, deps, scripts
All 11 capability interfaces are defined in src/capabilities/ and exported
CapabilityRegistry class registers providers, queries availability, detects platform
PermissionManager maps capabilities to permission tiers (0-4 matching AgentActionTier)
DeviceActionAudit provides append-only logging with query support
All tests in src/__tests__/ pass (registry, permission-manager, action-audit)
TypeScript compilation succeeds with no errors
verification: pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/device-control passes with all tests green
findings: Node.js needed to be installed via mise (MISE_NODE_VERIFY=0 to skip gpg). All 17 tests pass, typecheck clean, build succeeds. 492 LOC total in src/.
